# Generated client-like continuous NL aggregate.
# Do not edit by hand; regenerate with scripts/nl_tests/build_client_like_case_aggregate.py.
# Deduplication: global prompt text for non-continuous cases; continuous chains keep duplicate prompts.
# Run:
#   bash scripts/nl_tests/run_client_like_continuous_suite.sh --case-file scripts/nl_tests/cases/nl_cases_client_like_all_aggregate.txt --prompt-reply-only --quality-guard
# include_risky=False
# stats=files_seen=106 files_skipped_risky=2 files_skipped_temp=0 rows_deduped=689 rows_emitted=1652 rows_expect_dropped=507 rows_output=2100 rows_padded=448 rows_seen=2042 rows_skipped_excluded_skill=0 rows_skipped_risky=5
# target_rows=0 means no row-count padding.
# Default external publishing-channel exclusions are configured in the aggregate builder.
# Format: suite|name|tags|prompt|expect=optional substring

codex_cli_continuous_dev|nl_cases_codex_cli_continuous_dev_20260711_create_calc_project_zh|covers:continuous_dev,coding,create_files,run_tests,json_output,client_like,requires_tool_call=true,local_side_effect,client_like,aggregate|在 run/nl_eval_tmp/codex_cli_continuous_20260711_new 创建一个小型 Python 项目：新建 calc_core.py，实现 add(a,b) 和 sub(a,b)；新建 test_calc_core.py，覆盖这两个函数；运行 python3 test_calc_core.py。最后只输出 JSON，包含 created_files、test_command、test_status。

task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_local_process_poll_terminal_en|covers:poll_async_job,local_process_poll,terminal_projection,succeeded,checkpoint,requires_tool_call=false,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,client_like,aggregate|Dry run only: return the machine-token shape for a local-process async poll terminal projection. Include adapter_kind=local_process_poll, status=succeeded, terminal_projection, checkpoint_id, and result_ref tokens. Do not inspect files and do not start a job.
task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_local_process_cancel_contract_zh|covers:poll_async_job,local_process_poll,cancel_ref,cancelled,terminal_projection,task_lifecycle,requires_tool_call=false,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,client_like,aggregate|只做 dry-run，不要读取配置文件、不要检查 TOML、不要取消真实任务：按本地进程异步任务取消协议返回机器 token 示例，必须包含 cancel_ref、adapter_kind=local_process_poll、status=cancelled 和 terminal_projection。
task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_task_control_resume_pause_dry_run_zh|covers:task_control,resume,pause,checkpoint,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,requires_tool_call=true,dry_run,client_like,aggregate|只做 dry_run，不要实际恢复或暂停任务：对 task_id=00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000010 预览 task_control.resume(checkpoint_id=ckpt-1)，并预览 task_control.pause(pause_seconds=120)；最终必须包含 task_control.resume.dry_run、task_control.pause.dry_run 和 checkpoint_id。
task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_async_expiry_policy_en|covers:poll_async_job,expired,async_timeout_policy,effective_deadline,terminal_projection,requires_tool_call=false,dry_run,no_external_side_effect,client_like,aggregate|Dry run only: describe the structured async timeout policy fields used to decide whether a pending async job is expired before polling. Include effective_deadline_ts, expires_at, remaining_seconds, and the expired terminal status as machine tokens.
task_execution_async_lifecycle|nl_cases_task_execution_async_lifecycle_20260626_media_async_default_dry_run_zh|covers:video_generate,media_job_poll,async_start,poll_async_job,checkpoint,dry_run,media,video,no_external_side_effect,requires_tool_call=true,dry_run,client_like,aggregate|只做 dry_run，不要真实生成视频：用 video.generate 规划一个 6 秒状态面板视频，并返回 provider/model、dry_run=true、planned_outputs、adapter_kind=media_job_poll，以及真实生成时应进入 pending_async_job 的机器字段。
